holdings.infoBox: ROBT is an equity ETF with a total of 122 individual holdings. The top holdings are Palo Alto Networks stock at 2.48%, Marvell Technology at 2.33%, Cisco Systems at 2.01%, C3.ai at 1.81%, and Cloudflare at 1.75%.

overview.description: The First Trust Nasdaq Artificial Intelligence & Robotics ETF (ROBT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a modified equal-weighted index of all-cap, global companies involved in artificial intelligence or robotics. ROBT was launched on Feb 21, 2018 and is issued by First Trust.
